revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },

}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',

-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },

-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23275145964|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. -- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },

}
}

-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },

}
}

revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].

-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',

-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',

['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',

--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23317905571|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',

-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]

}
}

-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}

revision.text:
-- This module contains configuration data for [[Module:Submit an edit request]].
return {
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Messages --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- The default display value for edit requests. ['default-display-value'] = 'Submit an edit request',
-- The template that stores the edit request preload text ['preload-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/preload',
-- The section heading that is generated when a user clicks on an edit request -- link. $1 is the protection level text, e.g. "Semi-protected" or -- "Template-protected". $2 is the current date, in the format specified by the -- "preload-title-date-format" message. ['preload-title-text'] = '$1 edit request on $2',
-- The date format for the automatically-generated section heading. The format -- must be valid input for the #time parser function. ['preload-title-date-format'] = 'j F Y',
-- What do do with the generated section header if another header with the same section already exists -- $1 is the original section header. $2 is an automatically generated number, starting at 2 and increasing -- by one until a unique header is found. ['preload-title-dedup-suffix'] = '$1 ($2)',
-- The names of pages (and their subpages) that make up the content of the main page for this wiki ['main-page-content'] = { ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured article'] = true, ['Template:In the news'] = true, ['Template:Did you know'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Selected anniversaries'] = true, ['Template:POTD protected'] = true, ['Wikipedia:Today\'s featured list'] = true },
-- The page used to request changes to things on the Main Page. ['main-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Main Page/Errors',
-- The page used to request edits to protected talk pages. ['protected-talk-page-request-page'] = 'Wikipedia:Requests for page protection/Edit',
-- The names of the templates to be used as wrappers for the "link" and "button" -- functions. These are passed as arguments to the "wrappers" option of -- [[Module:Arguments]]. ['link-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request/link', ['button-wrapper-template'] = 'Template:Submit an edit request',
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------- -- Protection level config --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
protectionLevels = {
--[[ -- These settings are for the different protection levels which the module can -- output edit request links for. -- -- editintro: -- The template to use as the edit intro users see when they click on an edit -- request link. -- -- request-template: -- The name of the edit request template for that protection level. Do not -- include the "Template:" text. -- -- protectionlevel: -- The name of the protection level, used for formatting the automatically- -- generated section headings. --]]
-- Semi-protection semi = { editintro = 'Template:Edit semi-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit semi-protected', levelText = 'Semi-protected', },
-- Extended-confirmed-protection extended = { editintro = 'Template:Edit extended-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit extended-protected', levelText = 'Extended-confirmed-protected', },
-- Template-protection template = { editintro = 'Template:Edit template-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit template-protected', levelText = 'Template-protected', },
-- Full protection full = { editintro = 'Template:Edit fully-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit fully-protected', levelText = 'Protected', },
-- Interface-protection interface = { editintro = 'Template:Edit interface-protected/editintro', requestTemplate = 'edit interface-protected', levelText = 'Interface-protected', },
}
}
